tool.name: Topaz Extract
tool.description: Extract particles from micrographs using a trained model
tool.command:
#import re mkdir -p input_images && #for $img in $input_images: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) #if not $clean_name.endswith('.mrc') and not $clean_name.endswith('.tiff') and not $clean_name.endswith('.png'): #set $clean_name = $clean_name + "." + str($img.ext) #end if ln -s '$img' 'input_images/$clean_name' && #end for
#if str($output_mode) == 'per_micrograph': mkdir -p output_dir && #end if
topaz extract #if str($model_source.selector) == 'custom': --model '$model_source.custom_model' #else: --model '$model_source.pretrained_model' #end if #if $radius: --radius $radius #end if --threshold $threshold --down-scale $down_scale --up-scale $up_scale --num-workers \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --num-threads $num_threads --batch-size $batch_size #if $patch_size > 0: --patch-size $patch_size #end if #if $targets: --targets '$targets' --min-radius $radius_tuning.min_radius --max-radius $radius_tuning.max_radius --step-radius $radius_tuning.step_radius #if $radius_tuning.assignment_radius: --assignment-radius $radius_tuning.assignment_radius #end if #end if $only_validate --device $device --format '$format_' --dims $dims #if str($output_mode) == 'single': -o '$output_single' #else: --per-micrograph -o output_dir #end if input_images/*

param.name: custom_model
param.label: Trained Model File
param.help: Select your custom trained .sav model file.

param.name: radius
param.label: Extraction Radius (Pixels)
param.help: Radius of the regions to extract. If empty, you must provide Targets below to tune the radius.

param.name: threshold
param.label: Score Threshold
param.help: Log-likelihood score threshold at which to terminate region extraction. -6 is p>=0.0025. Default: -6.

param.name: batch_size
param.label: Batch Size
param.help: Batch size for scoring micrographs with the model.

param.name: patch_size
param.label: Patch Size
param.help: Patch size for scoring micrographs in pieces. Use 0 for no patching.

param.name: targets
param.label: Ground Truth Coordinates (Optional)
param.help: Path to file specifying particle coordinates, used to tune extraction radius or calculate AUPRC validation.

param.name: only_validate
param.label: Only Calculate Validation Metrics
param.help: Calculate and print validation metrics instead of reporting full prediction list.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool segments input micrographs using a trained Topaz neural network model and extracts particle coordinates using a non-maximum suppression (NMS) algorithm. It can output coordinates in Topaz, CSV, STAR, JSON, or EMAN Box format.
